ucs.title: [LLM] Contagious Interview — node/npm spawning Python or shell to stage InvisibleFerret after fake-interview repo clone
ucs.description: Hunts the BeaverTail → InvisibleFerret chain that defines DPRK's 'Contagious Interview' (a.k.a. DeceptiveDevelopment / DEV#POPPER / PurpleBravo / TAG-121 / Tenacious Pungsan) operation: a developer is social-engineered via LinkedIn/coding-test lure into running `npm install` from a trojanised GitHub repo, the malicious postinstall executes BeaverTail (obfuscated JS in node.exe), which then drops and runs the InvisibleFerret Python backdoor (`pay`/`bow.py`/`mlip.py`/`.npl`). Catches the parent=node/npm → child=python/curl/powershell pivot, which is highly atypical of legitimate npm modules.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.cmd","yarn.cmd","pnpm.cmd","node") AND Processes.process_name IN ("python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","curl.exe","cmd.exe","wget.exe","bash.exe","sh.exe") AND Processes.user!="SYSTEM" by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")` | where match(process,"(?i)(\.npl|bow\.py|mlip\.py|\bpay\b|harthat|auth-validator|iconpopup|node-logger|/api/[a-z0-9]{1,4}\b|/uploads/|/server|/pdown|getstubpacked|curl\s+\-?[A-Za-z]*\s+http)") | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | table firstTime lastTime host user parent_process_name process_name process
ucs.kql:
// Contagious Interview / DeceptiveDevelopment — BeaverTail postinstall spawning InvisibleFerret stager
let ci_indicators = dynamic([".npl", "bow.py", "mlip.py", "harthat", "auth-validator", "iconpopup", "node-logger", "/api/", "/uploads/", "/server", "/pdown", "getstubpacked", "invisibleferret"]);
let dev_tooling_parents = dynamic(["node.exe","npm.cmd","npm.exe","npx.cmd","yarn.cmd","pnpm.cmd"]);
let stager_children = dynamic(["python.exe","python3.exe","pythonw.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","curl.exe","cmd.exe","wget.exe","bash.exe"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (dev_tooling_parents)
| where FileName in~ (stager_children)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (ci_indicators)
   or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(curl|iwr|invoke-webrequest|wget|urllib|requests\.get).{1,200}https?://[^\s'""]+(/api/|/uploads/|/server|/pdown)"
   or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\Downloads\", @"\Desktop\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\Users\Public\")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildImage  = FolderPath,
          ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256, IsRemote = IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Contagious Interview — node/npm parent spawning Python/PowerShell stager carrying InvisibleFerret indicators
let ci_indicators = dynamic([".npl", "bow.py", "mlip.py", "harthat", "auth-validator", "iconpopup", "node-logger", "/api/", "/uploads/", "/server", "/pdown", "getstubpacked", "invisibleferret"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where ParentProcessName has_any ("\\node.exe","\\npm.cmd","\\npm.exe","\\npx.cmd","\\yarn.cmd","\\pnpm.cmd")
| where NewProcessName has_any ("\\python.exe","\\python3.exe","\\pythonw.exe","\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe","\\curl.exe","\\cmd.exe","\\wget.exe")
| where CommandLine has_any (ci_indicators)
   or CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(curl|iwr|invoke-webrequest|wget|urllib|requests\.get).{1,200}https?://[^\s'""]+(/api/|/uploads/|/server|/pdown)"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Contagious Interview BeaverTail to InvisibleFerret Stager
id: 7c4e2d3a-9f4d-46d1-9b2c-9d3e1c0a44a1
status: experimental
description: Detects DPRK Contagious Interview / DeceptiveDevelopment cluster (TAG-121, DEV#POPPER) staging InvisibleFerret via npm-installed BeaverTail loader; node/npm spawns python/powershell/curl with telltale C2 paths or .npl artifacts.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1052/
  - https://www.validin.com/blog/contagious_interview_north_korea_clickfix/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.006
  - attack.t1059.007
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.g1052
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\node.exe'
      - '\npm.cmd'
      - '\npm.exe'
      - '\npx.cmd'
      - '\yarn.cmd'
      - '\pnpm.cmd'
  child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\python.exe'
      - '\python3.exe'
      - '\pythonw.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\wget.exe'
  selection_indicators:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - '.npl'
      - 'bow.py'
      - 'mlip.py'
      - 'harthat'
      - 'auth-validator'
      - 'iconpopup'
      - 'node-logger'
      - '/api/'
      - '/uploads/'
      - '/pdown'
      - 'getstubpacked'
      - 'invisibleferret'
  condition: parent and child and selection_indicators
falsepositives:
  - Niche dev tooling that legitimately shells out to python (rare; investigate)
level: high
ucs.rationale: node.exe/npm.cmd legitimately spawns python or powershell almost never — node-gyp builds shell out to msbuild/cl.exe, not python or curl. The actor's signature is exactly this hand-off: BeaverTail (JS in node) → InvisibleFerret (Python) with strings like '.npl', 'bow.py', 'mlip.py', or HTTP staging to '/api/<id>' and '/pdown'. These artefacts are documented across Unit42, eSentire, Validin, Securo

_field_issues.message: `Downloads` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`Desktop` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`AppData` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`Local` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`Temp` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `Timestamp`?
`Users` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`Public` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

ucs.title: [LLM] Contagious Interview ClickFix — explorer.exe spawning shell with developer-targeted curl|iex from fake-interview lure
ucs.description: Hunts the ClickFix pivot adopted by Contagious Interview in late 2024 (per Validin/Sekoia): a fake recruitment site (e.g., bogus 'Willo Talent', 'Chapter Two', 'AssessmentLab' interview portal) shows a 'camera/microphone permission error' that instructs the candidate to press Win+R and paste a curl/iwr command, fetching BeaverTail-staged JS or InvisibleFerret. Detection looks for shell processes spawned by explorer.exe (Run-dialog paste) with web-download primitives plus developer-context strings (npm/node/python install) — atypical for normal user workflows.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=false count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="explorer.exe" AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","curl.exe","wscript.exe") AND Processes.user!="SYSTEM" by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")` | where match(process,"(?i)(invoke-webrequest|iwr\b|net\.webclient|downloadstring|downloaddata|bitstransfer|mshta\s+http|curl\s+\-?[a-z]*\s*http|wget\s+http)") AND match(process,"(?i)(npm\s+install|npx\s|node\s|python\s|pip\s+install|\.py\b|nvm\s|\.npl|/api/|/getstubpacked|/install\.sh|\.shop/|\.cyou/|\.icu/|\.click/|\.online/|github\.io|githubusercontent)") AND NOT match(process,"(?i)(microsoft\.com|windowsupdate|msftconnecttest|github\.com/microsoft|aka\.ms)") | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | table firstTime lastTime host user parent_process_name process_name process
ucs.kql:
// Contagious Interview ClickFix — Run-dialog paste of curl|iex with developer-context payload
let shells = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","curl.exe","wscript.exe"]);
let dev_lure_tokens = dynamic(["npm install","npm i ","npx ","node ","python ","pip install",".py",".npl","/api/","getstubpacked","willo","chapter-two","assessmentlab","talentlms","github.io","githubusercontent"]);
let sus_tlds = dynamic([".shop/",".cyou/",".icu/",".click/",".online/",".live/",".xyz/"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe"
| where FileName in~ (shells)
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(invoke-webrequest|\biwr\b|net\.webclient|downloadstring|downloaddata|bitstransfer|mshta\s+https?://|curl\s+\-?[a-z]*\s*https?://|wget\s+https?://)"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (dev_lure_tokens) or ProcessCommandLine has_any (sus_tlds)
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("microsoft.com","windowsupdate","msftconnecttest","github.com/microsoft","aka.ms"))
| extend ClickFixHint = iif(ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(verify|verification|captcha|recaptcha|fix|repair|driver|update.*browser)", "likely", "unknown")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, ClickFixHint, IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Contagious Interview ClickFix — explorer-spawned shell with curl/iwr to dev-themed lure
let shell_paths = dynamic(["\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe","\\cmd.exe","\\mshta.exe","\\curl.exe","\\wscript.exe"]);
let dev_lure_tokens = dynamic(["npm install","npm i ","npx ","node ","python ","pip install",".py",".npl","/api/","getstubpacked","willo","chapter-two","assessmentlab","github.io","githubusercontent"]);
let sus_tlds = dynamic([".shop/",".cyou/",".icu/",".click/",".online/",".live/",".xyz/"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where ParentProcessName endswith "\\explorer.exe"
| where NewProcessName has_any (shell_paths)
| where CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(invoke-webrequest|\biwr\b|net\.webclient|downloadstring|downloaddata|bitstransfer|mshta\s+https?://|curl\s+\-?[a-z]*\s*https?://|wget\s+https?://)"
| where CommandLine has_any (dev_lure_tokens) or CommandLine has_any (sus_tlds)
| where not(CommandLine has_any ("microsoft.com","windowsupdate","msftconnecttest","github.com/microsoft","aka.ms"))
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: Run-dialog paste (parent=explorer.exe, child=cmd/powershell with web-download verbs) is the structural fingerprint of every ClickFix campaign, but Contagious Interview's variant is uniquely identifiable because the pasted payload is dev-themed — npm/python/node/pip strings or interview-portal domains (Willo, Chapter Two, AssessmentLab) per Validin's Jan-2025 reporting. Generic ClickFix (Storm-1865

_field_issues.message: `ClickFixHint` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
`IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?
